Who I Am

Two Worlds.
One Vision.

🫀
Clinical Expertise

As an Anesthesia Technologist, I work at the forefront of patient care — preparing and maintaining life-critical equipment, supporting anesthesia teams, and ensuring every procedure runs with precision and safety.

Anesthesia Technology Patient Monitoring OR Equipment Clinical Safety ICU Support
💻
IT Specialization

As an IT Specialist with a healthcare lens, I bridge technology gaps in medical environments — from network infrastructure and system administration to health informatics and digital transformation.

Health Informatics Network Admin System Troubleshooting Digital Solutions Tech Integration

My unique position at the intersection of healthcare and technology allows me to see problems that others miss — and build solutions that actually work in real clinical environments. I don't just understand the tech; I understand why it matters to a patient's life.

What I Offer

How I Can Help You

01
Healthcare IT Consulting

Bridging the communication gap between clinical staff and IT teams. I translate real healthcare challenges into practical digital solutions that actually work on the floor.

02
Clinical Equipment Management

Expert management, maintenance, and troubleshooting of anesthesia machines, ventilators, and patient monitoring systems for optimal OR performance.

03
Tech Training for Clinicians

Empowering healthcare professionals to confidently use modern technology — from electronic health records to diagnostic equipment — through practical, hands-on training.

04
Digital Health Innovation

Identifying opportunities where technology can improve patient outcomes, reduce errors, and streamline clinical processes — with the perspective of someone who has lived both worlds.

05
Network & Systems Support

Reliable IT infrastructure support tailored to the unique demands of healthcare settings — where downtime is not just costly, it's critical.

06
Personal Brand Building

Helping healthcare professionals position themselves as thought leaders in the digital age — building a presence that reflects their expertise and opens new opportunities.
